hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); upper=$(echo "$input" | tr "[:lower:]" "[:upper:]"); for pat in "DROP " "DROP\t" "TRUNCATE " "TRUNCATE\t" "ALTER TABLE" "CREATE TABLE" "GRANT " "GRANT\t" "REVOKE " "REVOKE\t"; do if echo "$upper" | grep -q "$pat"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive SQL command detected (matched: $pat). Use a migration script instead of raw DDL." >&2; exit 1; fi; done'

bash -c 'input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qiE "(psql|pg_dump|pg_restore|sqlplus|SELECT |INSERT |UPDATE |DELETE )"; then mkdir -p workspace/logs; ts=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"); echo "{\"event\": \"db_query_executed\", \"timestamp\": \"$ts\"}" >> workspace/logs/db-query-audit.log; echo "DB query logged at $ts"; fi'

bash -c 'PROGRESS=workspace/progress.json; if [ -f "$PROGRESS" ]; then echo "=== OMA Pipeline Cycle Summary ==="; python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); p=d.get(\"_pipeline\",{}); phases=p.get(\"phases\",{}); total=len(phases); done=sum(1 for v in phases.values() if v.get(\"status\")==\"done\"); s=p.get(\"summary\",{}); print(f\"Completed: {done}/{total} phases\"); [print(f\"  Phase {k}: {v.get(\"status\",\"unknown\")}\") for k,v in sorted(phases.items())]; print(f\"OK:{s.get(\"success\",0)} FAIL:{s.get(\"fail\",0)} WAIT:{s.get(\"pending\",0)} ESC:{s.get(\"escalated\",0)}\")" "$PROGRESS" 2>/dev/null || echo "Progress file exists but could not be parsed."; else echo "No progress.json found. Pipeline has not been started."; fi'
